items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Claude Code 推出全新渲染器，可通过 CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1 启用。Thariq 邀请用户试用并分享体验反馈，同时发布了完整文档链接。
items.content_en: Claude Code launches a new renderer, enabled via CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1. Thariq invites users to try it and share their experience, along with full documentation links.

items.author: Swyx
items.bio: AI Engineer founder, Latent Space podcast
items.content_zh: Swyx 指出全球约 80% 的 AI agent 和 AI 工程工作集中在旧金山的 3 平方英里范围内，凸显了 AI 开发的极度地理集中性。
items.content_en: Swyx points out that roughly 80% of the world's AI agents and AI engineering work happens within 3 square miles in San Francisco, highlighting the extreme geographic concentration of AI development.

items.author: Swyx
items.bio: AI Engineer founder, Latent Space podcast
items.content_zh: Swyx 透露 Cognition 的使用量在两次发布后全球翻倍，用户发现了各种组合 agent 和让 agent 主动工作的创意用法。他提出「agent 递归就是你所需要的一切」这一观点，暗示 agent 之间的组合与递归调用可能是下一个重要范式。
items.content_en: Swyx reveals Cognition's usage has roughly doubled globally since two recent launches, with users discovering creative use cases for composing agents together and making them proactive. He suggests 'agent recursion is all you need' — hinting that composition and recursive agent invocation may be the next important paradigm.

items.author: Ryo Lu
items.content_zh: Cursor 即将推出更多自定义和多 agent 视图功能，支持上下左右分屏布局，让开发者可以同时查看多个 agent 的工作状态。
items.content_en: Cursor is rolling out more customization and multi-agent views — split panes up, down, left, right — letting developers monitor multiple agents working simultaneously.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: Vercel 开源 Open Agents——面向云端编码 agent 的参考平台。Rauch 解释了为什么 Stripe、Ramp、Spotify 等公司都在构建自己的「AI 软件工厂」：现有 agent 无法处理大型 monorepo，缺乏机构知识和自定义工作流。未来软件公司的护城河将从「写的代码」转向「生产代码的手段」。Open Agents 部署在 Vercel 的 agentic 基础设施上。
items.content_en: Vercel open-sources Open Agents — a reference platform for cloud coding agents. Rauch explains why companies like Stripe, Ramp, and Spotify are building their own 'AI software factories': off-the-shelf agents can't handle huge monorepos or institutional knowledge. The moat will shift from 'code written' to 'means of production.' Open Agents runs on Vercel's agentic infrastructure.

items.author: Peter Yang
items.bio: Product at Roblox, AI newsletter author
items.content_zh: Peter Yang 认为如果 GPT 在 OpenClaw 上的集成体验不尽快改善，这对 OpenAI 将是一个小型危机。标杆是：GPT 在 OpenClaw 上的表现需要至少与 Opus 持平甚至更好。
items.content_en: Peter Yang argues that if GPT's OpenClaw integration doesn't improve soon, it's a mini-crisis for OpenAI. The bar is clear: GPT needs to be just as good as — if not better than — Opus for OpenClaw users.

items.author: Peter Yang
items.bio: Product at Roblox, AI newsletter author
items.content_zh: Peter Yang 提出 AI 工具使用者的常见陷阱：你是在真正用 OpenClaw 和 Claude Code 完成工作，还是只是在不停优化工具配置？后者感觉像在工作（而且很有趣），但超过一定程度后并不真正提升生产力。
items.content_en: Peter Yang identifies a common trap for AI tool users: are you actually getting real work done with OpenClaw and Claude Code, or just endlessly optimizing your setup? The latter feels like progress (and is fun), but isn't actually productive beyond a certain point.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj 揭示前沿 AI 实验室最强大的人才留存福利可能是「真正无限的 token」。一个真实故事：有人加入高速增长的 agentic 创业公司后发现有 token 限制、需要用开源模型平衡成本，最终决定回到前沿实验室。
items.content_en: Nikunj reveals that frontier AI labs' greatest retention perk may be truly unlimited tokens. Real story: someone joined a fast-growing agentic startup, discovered token limits and the need to use open-source models to balance costs, and decided to go back to the frontier lab.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 提出企业将出现全新角色——「agent 部署与管理者」。此人需要识别团队中最高杠杆的工作流、设计未来状态流程、连接业务系统、管理数据流和人机交互节点，并持续追踪 KPI。这不是中心化角色，每个团队都需要这样的人，对下一代技术型人才和转型工程师都是巨大机会。
items.content_en: Levie predicts a new enterprise role: the 'agent deployer and manager.' This person identifies high-leverage workflows, designs future-state automation, connects business systems, manages data flows and human-agent touchpoints, and tracks KPIs. Not centralized — every team needs one. A huge opportunity for next-gen technical hires and transitioning engineers.

items.author: Kevin Weil
items.content_zh: Kevin Weil 公开力挺 OpenAI 联合创始人 Greg Brockman 的观点，展示了 OpenAI 高层在关键议题上的团结立场。
items.content_en: Kevin Weil publicly endorses OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman's take, signaling alignment among OpenAI's leadership on a key issue.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 发布 GBrain v0.9.3 更新（搜索调优、CJK 查询支持、安全修复），并透露 GBrain 就是他个人的 OpenClaw/Hermes Agent 配置——不仅是搜索，还包括基于 OpenAI Realtime 构建的语音 agent 等技能包（即将升级到 Gemini Live）。
items.content_en: Garry Tan releases GBrain v0.9.3 (search tuning, CJK query support, security fixes) and reveals GBrain is literally his personal OpenClaw/Hermes Agent setup — not just opinionated search but also skillpacks including a voice agent built on OpenAI Realtime (upgrading to Gemini Live soon).

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.content_zh: Dan Shipper 推荐「agent 就是一个文件夹」这一心智模型，称其彻底改变了他对 AI 系统的思考方式。同时分享了一篇关于语言模型如何改变世界观的哲学思考文章。
items.content_en: Dan Shipper recommends the mental model 'an agent is just a folder' as transformative for how he thinks about AI systems. Also shared a philosophical essay on how language models have changed his worldview.

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.content_zh: Dan Shipper 提出 2026 年软件工程需要两种角色：海盗（pirate）和建筑师（architect）。海盗快速编码以发现价值，建筑师将混乱转化为精密机器。这一分工反映了 AI 加速开发时代的新工程文化。
items.content_en: Dan Shipper argues 2026 software engineering needs two roles: the pirate who codes fast to find value, and the architect who turns that mess into a well-oiled machine. This division reflects a new engineering culture in the AI-accelerated era.

items.author: Amjad Masad
items.content_zh: Replit 上线应用托管区域配置功能，用户可选择部署地区，对合规和隐私法规（如 GDPR）尤为重要。这是 Replit 平台企业化的又一步。
items.content_en: Replit launches app hosting region configuration, letting users choose deployment regions — especially useful for compliance and privacy regulations like GDPR. Another step in Replit's enterprise maturation.

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara 开源了一个用 vibe coding 构建的 Chrome「新标签页」替代品：展示所有标签页并按域名分组、关闭标签时有音效和彩带特效、一键清理重复标签和「easy win」标签（如首页、localhost）、未完成的标签可保存为待办清单。她称之为「浏览器标签的近藤麻理惠整理法」。
items.content_en: Zara open-sourced a vibe-coded Chrome 'New Tab' replacement: see all tabs grouped by domain, closing tabs triggers sound effects and confetti, batch-close duplicate and 'easy win' tabs (homepages, localhost), and save unfinished tabs to a checklist. She calls it the 'Marie Kondo method for browser tabs.'

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: Rauch 分享产品管理心得：创建一个 X 群聊，邀请你最优秀、最苛刻的客户和工程主管加入，快速响应和交付。Vercel 已在 v0 产品上实践这一策略，并邀请用户加入提供反馈。
items.content_en: Rauch shares a product management tip: create an X group chat with your best, most demanding customers and engineering leads. Respond and ship quickly. Face the music. Vercel already practices this for v0 and invites users to join.

items.author: Peter Yang
items.bio: Product at Roblox, AI newsletter author
items.content_zh: Peter Yang 指出他的信息流和 Claude 社区都在讨论 Opus 被削弱的问题，并提出反问：Anthropic 为什么要故意削弱自己的模型？这一讨论反映了用户对模型性能变化的高度敏感。
items.content_en: Peter Yang notes his entire feed and the Claude subreddit are full of people claiming Opus got nerfed, and poses the question: why would Anthropic nerf its own models? The discussion reflects users' extreme sensitivity to perceived model performance changes.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 指出安全领域即将迎来 Jevons 悖论时刻：AI 将生成百倍代码量，随之带来海量安全风险，AI 是唯一能处理这些新威胁的工具，但最终仍需专家来管理流程。安全人才需求不会减少反而会大幅增加。
items.content_en: Levie highlights security as the next category hitting its Jevons paradox moment: AI will generate 100x more code and surface vastly more security threats. AI is the only way to triage these new risks, but experts are still needed on the other side to manage the process. Security talent demand will increase, not decrease.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 与数十位企业 IT 和 AI 领导交流后总结七大发现：企业正从聊天时代转向使用工具和处理数据的 agent；变革管理仍是最大挑战；企业面临 token 预算的「鲨鱼池」式内部竞争；修复碎片化遗留系统是当务之急；企业不是在讨论裁员而是在做以前做不到的事；headless 软件成为刚需——没有好 API 的供应商将被淘汰；互操作性至关重要。最后的元洞察：尽管硅谷认为 AI 让复杂变简单，但 agent 部署实际上比以前更「技术化」，工程师的角色不是消失而是转变。
items.content_en: Levie shares seven key takeaways from meeting dozens of enterprise IT and AI leaders: companies are moving from the chat era to agents that use tools and execute real work; change management remains the biggest challenge; enterprises face 'shark tank' style internal competition for token budgets; fixing fragmented legacy systems is urgent; companies aren't discussing job cuts but doing things they couldn't before; headless software is non-negotiable — vendors without good APIs will be dropped; interoperability is paramount. Meta insight: despite Silicon Valley's belief that AI makes hard things easy, deploying agents is actually more 'technical' than prior eras, meaning engineers won't write software but will set up and operate the systems that automate enterprise work.

items.author: Kevin Weil
items.content_zh: Kevin Weil 分享了一个深刻观点：人类智能和计算机智能不是同一条线上的不同点，而是存在于高维空间中——我们应该探索更多这个空间，而非简单地比较谁更「聪明」。
items.content_en: Kevin Weil shares a key insight: human intelligence and computer intelligence are not different points on a line, but exist in a high-dimensional space — we should explore more of that space rather than simply comparing who is 'smarter.'

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 提炼了他今年在 agentic 工程方面学到的最简洁架构原则：将人类擅长的模糊操作推入 markdown skills（厚技能），将必须精确的确定性操作推入代码（厚代码），而 harness 保持精简。核心理念是「在正确的层做正确的事，其他都是架构天文学」。
items.content_en: Garry Tan distills his simplest architecture principle for agentic engineering this year: push smart fuzzy operations humans do into markdown skills (fat skills), push must-be-perfect deterministic operations into code (fat code), and keep the harness thin. Core philosophy: 'Do the right job at the right layer — everything else is architecture astronomy.'

items.author: Claude Blog
items.content_zh: Anthropic 发布安全研究报告，详细阐述如何为 AI 加速的攻击做好安全准备。报告基于 Project Glasswing 的实践经验，指出 AI 模型正在快速降低发现和利用漏洞所需的资源、时间和技能门槛，并为安全团队提供了前瞻性的防御策略框架。
items.content_en: Anthropic publishes a security research report on preparing security programs for AI-accelerated offense. Based on Project Glasswing findings, the report details how AI models are rapidly reducing the resources, time, and skill required to find and exploit vulnerabilities, and provides a forward-looking defensive strategy framework for security teams.

items.author: Aditya Agarwal
items.bio: South Park Commons GP, ex-Dropbox CTO
items.content_zh: Agarwal 观察到 Anthropic 的文化与早期 Facebook 惊人相似——尽管 OpenAI 有更多 Facebook 前员工。相似点包括：内部氛围充满乐趣、对世界有一定天真、自下而上的黑客文化、极强的使命认同感、可能有点过于严肃对待自己、以及「赢」能解决很多问题。
items.content_en: Agarwal observes that Anthropic's culture is strikingly similar to early Facebook — despite OpenAI having more ex-Facebook people. Similarities include: people having a lot of fun internally, a certain naivete about the world, bottoms-up hacker culture, insane mission alignment, possibly taking themselves a bit too seriously, and winning solving a lot of problems.

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara 提出 AI 时代人类沟通的三大核心用途：决定做什么以及「好」的标准是什么、陪伴彼此防止孤独和建立同志情谊、创意头脑风暴。项目同步、状态更新、交接等任务将由 agent 接管。同时指出最高效的人类协作方式是「不协作」——一个人端到端负责，配合 agent 工作。
items.content_en: Zara argues human communication in the AI era serves three core purposes: deciding what to work on and what 'good' looks like, keeping each other company to prevent loneliness, and creative brainstorming. Project syncs, status updates, and handovers will be handled by agents. Also proposes the most efficient collaboration is 'don't collaborate' — one person owns things end-to-end, working with agents.

items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Claude Code 现在有了 TurboTax 连接器，可以直接在终端中处理报税事务。Thariq 调侃说庆幸自己一直拖着没报税。
items.content_en: Claude Code now has a TurboTax connector, letting you handle tax filing right from the terminal. Thariq jokes he's glad he procrastinated on his taxes.

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.content_zh: Steinberger 发布 OpenClaw 重大更新：harness 现在可以作为插件替换，意味着可以轻松将默认 Pi harness 替换为 Anthropic SDK 或自定义实现。同时推出两个实验性功能：1）Strict Mode 强制 GPT-5.x 持续工作而非停在「这是计划」；2）原生 Codex 作为 OpenClaw harness，让 Codex 接管线程管理、恢复和压缩。
items.content_en: Steinberger announces a major OpenClaw update: harnesses can now be plugins, making it trivial to swap the default Pi harness for Anthropic's SDK or custom implementations. Also introduces two experiments: 1) Strict Mode forcing GPT-5.x to keep working instead of stopping at 'here's the plan'; 2) Native Codex as OpenClaw harness, letting Codex own threads, resume, compaction, and app-server execution.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: Vercel Sandbox 成为最快的基于 microVM 的沙箱环境。无论是 OpenClaw、coding agent 还是并行计算，Vercel 认为这是新世界的基础设施。客户迁移反馈显示其真实场景下的性能和可靠性无可匹敌。
items.content_en: Vercel Sandbox is now the fastest microVM-based sandbox. Whether for OpenClaw, coding agents, or compute parallelism, Vercel sees this as the foundation of the new world. Customer migration feedback confirms unmatched real-world performance and reliability.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj 批评了 VC 行业的「markup 文化」：同一个 VC 先以低估值投资口头承诺长期陪跑，6 个月后却催促创始人接受最高估值以向 LP 展示 markup。提醒创始人远离只关心账面回报的投资人。
items.content_en: Nikunj critiques VC 'markup culture': the same VC who pushed for a low valuation citing long-term conviction, 6 months later pushes for the highest valuation to show marks to LPs. Warns founders to avoid VCs who only care about paper markups.

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: FirstMark Capital VC, MAD Podcast host
items.content_zh: Matt Turck 引用观点：AI 客服领域的供应商数量已经多到可以认为这是一个「已解决的问题」，暗示该赛道竞争已经饱和。
items.content_en: Matt Turck shares the take that there are so many AI customer service vendors that it's 'basically a solved problem' — signaling the space is saturated with competition.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 提出反直觉观点：AI 时代律师会更多而非更少。原因有三：AI 让更多人能提出法律问题从而需要真人律师验证执行；AI 产生大量新型法律条款需要审核；AI 本身在各行业带来全新的法律领域（IP、合规、监管）。
items.content_en: Levie makes a counterintuitive argument: AI will create more lawyers, not fewer. Three reasons: AI enables more people to ask legal questions requiring human verification; AI generates exotic new legal terms needing review; and AI itself creates entirely new areas of law (IP, compliance, regulation) across every industry.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 用数据中心资本支出图表说明 AI 需求的规模：亚马逊过去 3 年的资本支出超过了此前全部历史。当前大部分 AI 使用集中在 token 效率较高的聊天工具上，但 coding agent 的 token 消耗量高出数个数量级，而这种模式即将扩展到所有知识工作领域。
items.content_en: Levie uses datacenter capex charts to illustrate AI demand scale: Amazon's capex in the last 3 years exceeds its entire history. Most AI usage today is token-efficient chat tools, but coding agents consume orders of magnitude more tokens and this pattern is about to hit all knowledge work.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 分享了通过与 Claw 聊天学习语音系统延迟和构建知识的体验，展示了 AI agent 作为教育工具的强大潜力。
items.content_en: Garry Tan shares how chatting with the Claw provided a powerful education on voice system latency and architecture, demonstrating AI agents' potential as learning tools.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 在开源 3 个月、每天被数万 agentic 工程师使用后，提出「Thin Harness, Fat Skills」架构哲学：harness 应该是薄薄的导体，只负责读取文件；memory 是 markdown，skills 是 markdown，brain 是 git repo。如果你的 harness 死了记忆就丢失，说明你的 harness 建得太厚了。
items.content_en: After 3 months of open source used by tens of thousands of agentic engineers daily, Garry Tan proposes the 'Thin Harness, Fat Skills' architecture: the harness should be a thin conductor that reads files, not owns them. Memory is markdown, skills are markdown, brain is a git repo. If your memory dies when your harness dies, you built it too thick.

items.author: Aditya Agarwal
items.bio: South Park Commons GP, ex-Dropbox CTO
items.content_zh: Agarwal 指出真正的「agent」与简单的 LLM 循环或事件触发之间的核心区别在于：智能的长时间记忆管理。Claude Code 架构中最有趣的部分正是其三层记忆架构。
items.content_en: Agarwal identifies the key difference between a true 'agent' and simply running an LLM in a loop: intelligent long-horizon memory management. The most interesting aspect of Claude Code's architecture is its 3-tier memory system.
